title: Type Annotate
description: Explicitly define types for various data formats including numbers and booleans.
problemStatement:
Precise data! Declare three variables: `count` (number, value 10), `isDone` (boolean, value false), and `title` (string, value 'Hello').

**Requirement:** Use explicit type annotations for each variable.
hints: Always try to provide types so TypeScript can help you catch bugs!
expectedOutput: Variables with correct types and values
